title: Toss
description: Settle ties fairly: the result is sealed before being revealed, nobody can cheat, and a proof is kept.

form.title: Decision setup
form.subtitle: Choose a coin toss or a draw between named options.
form.label: Decision label
form.optionsHelp: One option per line. Duplicate and empty values are ignored.

result.title: Result
result.subtitle: The seed is hidden until reveal, then the proof can be verified independently.
result.empty: Prepare a commitment first. No magic coin from a suspicious pocket here.
result.explanation: The commitment is generated before the result. After reveal, the seed and hashes prove that the result was not changed.

proof.title: Technical proof (advanced)
proof.subtitle: To verify the draw independently. Not needed for everyday use.
proof.placeholder: The proof will appear here after preparation.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Last local revealed tosses kept in the browser.

errors.optionsRequired: At least two distinct options are required.
errors.cryptoUnavailable: Secure Web Crypto APIs are not available in this browser.

intro: This module settles ties fairly (shooting order, target assignment…). Start by describing the decision, then lock the draw.
